# Negative fixtures for owner-decision-tracker regex tightening per Sub-slice A.
# Each non-comment line represents text that should NOT match any prose-decision-ask
# pattern after the lookbehind + split-variant tightening per
# bridge/gtkb-gov-askuserquestion-enforcement-stack-slice-a-hook-reenable-007.md.

# Status statements without ? or 1st-person construct (S328 directive)
Awaiting your direction.
Awaiting owner direction. No stale-entry act required.
Awaiting your decision.
Awaiting Codex re-review on -003.
Awaiting CI green on develop.
Sub-slice F's promotion gate is awaiting owner approval per the umbrella scope.

# Quoted/backtick-bounded FP class (DECISION-0001 + DECISION-0002, S309)
ose anti-patterns ("want me to X or Y?") and logs them.
The detector saw `"want me to X or Y?"` as a literal string.
prose anti-patterns ("should I X or Y?") and logs them.
The detector saw `"awaiting your direction?"` as a literal example.
The detector saw `"want me to X or Y?"` and described it.

# Abstract decision discussion (existing T14 guards)
The decision was hard, choosing between A or B felt risky.
In general, decisions about scope are tricky.
